_comment: Copy to <repo>/.brigade/config.local.json. Your own settings for this one repo — never committed (.brigade/ lives in .git/info/exclude). This layer wins over everything else.

circuitBreaker._comment: This repo's tests are flaky, so give items more rope before the breaker trips.

contextSources._comment: Same id as the team layer, so this tunes that source rather than adding a second one.
